entries.message: Add Telegram channel news scraper and API endpoint
Resolve ESLint and TypeScript CI errors
Add Last Updates section, reactive locale titles, i18n fixes
Tailwind v4 @apply error in PaginationBar, remove obsolete docker-compose version
Replace Load More with numbered page navigation in Browse
Add PaginationBar component and expose pagination meta from useAnime
Security hardening — path traversal, timing attacks, SSRF, CORS, proxy validation
Unified subtitle selector for HiAnime and Consumet players
Add global navbar search autocomplete, fix Kodik 0-episode movies
Reduce perceived lag and layout shifts, update READMEs
Add genre filter popup to Browse and Profile watchlist
Specify GORM join keys for anime_genres many2many relation
Add genre sort to watchlist and misc improvements
Header glassmorphism, Telegram widget UX, watchlist search, and rating aggregation
Add watchlist search and eliminate all no-explicit-any warnings
Prevent theme ratings disappearing after JWT token expiry
Resolve CI lint failures for Go and frontend workflows
Resolve lint errors, test failures, and update CI workflows
Add themes service, API key auth, Shikimori sync, and gateway latency fix
Add activity feed on home page showing user status changes and ratings
Consolidate to single database, add metrics library, error reporting, and Grafana alerting
Add external subtitle support to AnimeLib player
Add AnimeLib parser, player improvements, and update video architecture docs
HiAnime matching, Consumet quality/server switch, and fullscreen subtitle sizing
Japanese subtitles with selectable text overlay, ARM ID mapping, and fullscreen support
Add Video.js player with native HLS.js fallback and player selector
Enrich profile page with avatar upload, inline editing, sorting, i18n, and stats
Add Jikan parser, favicons, MAL import improvements, and catalog enhancements
Harden gateway CORS, per-IP rate limiting, and bind ports to localhost
Mobile layout improvements and navigation overhaul
Kodik token extraction broken by upstream source change
HLS proxy routing and Consumet provider improvements
Add Consumet as alternative English anime provider
Add HiAnime parser, database backup system, and GORM refactoring
Enable Grafana anonymous auth and remove pgAdmin
Add admin panel proxy with dev mode and fix Grafana CSRF
Add MAL export microservice with delayed anime loading
Add Docker monitoring stack with Prometheus, Grafana, pgAdmin
Add public profile feature for sharing anime watchlists
Add Shikimori search button and show last updated date for ongoings
Update docker-compose syntax, kustomize labels, and add metrics lib to Dockerfiles
Replace native selects with custom Select component
Add Prometheus monitoring, admin interfaces, and E2E tests
Add MAL import and MAL-style profile list view
Redesign home page with 3 columns layout
Remove kind filter from Shikimori search to include ONA/OVA/movies
Update docker-compose for external postgres and Go 1.22
Add secure refresh token, watchlist, and reviews system
Add Playwright e2e tests for critical flows
Add polish - skeleton loaders and CSS utilities
